home.title: Welcome to Shaking Head News
home.subtitle: Improve your neck health through page rotation while browsing news

news.title: 📰 Real-time News
news.description: Get the latest news from multiple sources

rotation.title: 🔄 Page Rotation
rotation.description: Automatic page rotation to help exercise your neck

stats.title: 📊 Health Statistics
stats.description: Track your neck exercise data and build healthy habits

i18n.description: Support for Chinese and English with automatic news source switching

sync.title: ☁️ Cloud Sync
sync.description: Sync your settings and preferences across devices after login

theme.title: 🎨 Custom Themes
theme.description: Support for light and dark themes with customizable font sizes

stats.healthReminderComingSoonDescription: Set scheduled reminders to help build a healthier routine

about.metaDescription: Learn about the features of Shaking Head News
about.backgroundDescription: Prolonged use of computers and phones can lead to cervical spine issues. This project helps users exercise their neck while browsing news through automatic page rotation, improving cervical health.
about.license: This project is licensed under the MPL-2.0 License.
